name: Ginger Liqueur
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a quart jar.
2. Allow the mixture to steep for 14 days, stirring occasionally.
3. Strain the liqueur into a clean pint jar.
4. The liqueur is now ready to serve and will be enjoyed by true ginger lovers.
5. This unique addition can enhance meat and poultry marinades with its authentic zing.
